codeReview.summary: The fix directly closes the prior scrutiny gap. Unlike the original failed feature, the updated core regression now configures a real structured-output agent via `output_schema`, proves `max_turns` exhaustion in both non-streamed and streamed runs, and asserts that the runtime carries the structured output schema on every model request. The companion facade regression exercises the same behavior through the public `openai-agents` runner surface.

summary: Pass: reviewed the fix feature transcript and both diffs; the new tests replace the old structured-tool-output proxy with true structured-output runtime coverage and adequately resolve the prior scrutiny failure. No remaining issues found in scope.
